CustomField.formula:
IF( TEXT(Customer__r.Hisense_Entity__c) == '8500' || TEXT(Customer__r.Hisense_Entity__c) == '8510' || TEXT(Customer__r.Hisense_Entity__c) == '8400', IF( CONTAINS('TV,Laser TV', TEXT(Product_Line_Name__c)), 'CE', IF( CONTAINS('AC,LCAC',TEXT(Product_Line_Name__c)),'AC', IF( TEXT(Product_Line_Name__c) == 'Mobile','Mobile', IF( CONTAINS('Refrigerator,Freezer,WM,Small Domestic Home Appliances,Cooking,Dishwasher',TEXT(Product_Line_Name__c)),'HA',null )))), IF( CONTAINS('8000,8010,8040,8050,8060,8070,8080,80B0,80A0,8090,8999,8110,8140',TEXT(Customer__r.Hisense_Entity__c)),TEXT(Product_Line_Name__c), IF( TEXT(Customer__r.Hisense_Entity__c) == '8200', IF( CONTAINS('TV,Laser TV', TEXT(Product_Line_Name__c)), 'BG', IF( CONTAINS('AC,LCAC,Refrigerator,Freezer,WM,Small Domestic Home Appliances,Cooking,Dishwasher', TEXT(Product_Line_Name__c)), 'WG',null)),TEXT(Product_Line_Name__c)) )
)
CustomField.label: Parent Product Line
